class.name: Secp256k1
class.brief_description: Basic proxy into the libsecp256k1 cryptography library
class.description: Only includes the schnorr signing API

method.name: schnorr_sign
method.description: Create a schnorr signature of a 32 byte id

method.name: get_public_key
method.description: Return the public key used during signing

method.name: keygen
method.description: Generates the keys used for schnorr signing. Returns an godot Error.
